subcodes.first_line: O thou who art alive with life eternal! That which thou didst write became clear and manifest in meaning, and the spirit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زنده بزندگی جاودان آنچه مرقوم نموده بودی مضمون واضح و عیان گشت و روح و
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
